case_title: ROBERT V JUSTICE DR VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUSTICE DR, ROBERT V
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS DENIED. THE REQUEST WAS NOT FILED AT LEAST 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AND DID NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR THE LATE REQUEST.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $100.00 SERVED MAY-08-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ROBERT V. JUSTICE DR IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. IS REPRESENTED BY TIFFANY MATTIS OPERATIONAL RISK CONSULTANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JUSTICE DR, ROBERT V AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
